name: AP 3-D Art and Design
notes: AP 3-D Art and Design is a portfolio-only assessment with no timed written exam. Primary URL (apcentral .../exam) returned HTTP 404; used apstudents assessment page. Two portfolio sections: Sustained Investigation (60% of score, 15 digital images plus written documentation) and Selected Works (40% of score, images of 5 works, 2 views each = 10 images, plus written descriptions). Submitted via AP Digital Portfolio. No MCQ, no FRQ, no durations published. Dataset values mcqCount=0, frqCount=0, totalMinutes=0, mcqMinutes/frqMinutes=pending are consistent with a portfolio (no timed exam); pending should arguably be n/a for the minutes fields since no such timed sections exist.
